title: Disposable Dish Cloths - 2 Rolls Microfiber Roll Reusable Cleaning Rag Roll Microfiber hand tear cloth All Purpose Cloth Roll Hand Towel Cloth for Kitchen Cloth 40 Count Total(Pink)
features: ULTRA SOFT & SCRATCH MATERIAL - Ultra soft and highly absorbent microfiber cleaning cloths, like a paper towel roll, and fit your paper towel rail, they are perforated so you can tear the size you need. Perfect for cleaning windows, kitchenware, car or other delicate surfaces. 25 x 25 cm per sheet, 20 sheets/roll, 2 rolls pink, 40 sheets in total.

ABSORBENT & LINT FREE - Made of 85% polyester, 15% nylon. Great for washing dishes and cleaning small masses in the kitchen, a practical solution for daily cleaning without lint or streaks. Clean with or without water, countertops, appliances, kitchens, bathrooms, mirrors, etc., they will make your home sparkle.

FOR VERSATILE CLEANING WORKS - Premium microfiber tea towels are also perfect for dish towels that don't smell, remove grease and particles from microwave oven, plates, pots or pans effortlessly. Not only that, you will be amazed that they are also great that easily remove fingertips from silverware and glasses and leave your kitchen spotless.

REUSABLE & DURABLE - Microfiber towels feature high quality stitching with reinforced edges, they are durable and made to last hundreds of washes. They are lightweight, super absorbent and dry quickly, use them every day to enjoy your cleaning, you will save a lot of money compared to kitchen paper towels in the long run.

Our mission: make your housework easier and make your home cleaner. If you have any questions about the product or after-sales service, please feel free to contact us. description: Features:Microfiber Material: Crafted from microfibers, these cleaning cloths are not only durable but also incredibly soft. Their fine texture enhances their absorption capacity, making them perfect for soaking up liquids.Versatile Dry and Wet Use: These rags are a versatile addition to your cleaning arsenal. Whether you need to wipe down faucets, clean countertops, dust furniture, or polish glassware, they excel in both dry and wet applications.Hand-Tearable Design: These microfiber cloths feature a user-friendly hand-tearable design, allowing you to easily tear off the cloths. Say goodbye to struggling with scissors or oversized cloths.Powerful Cleaning Performance: These cleaning cloths are your secret weapon against stubborn grease and grime. Designed for heavy-duty cleaning, they excel at tackling dishes, pots, and countertops in high-oil areas.Eco-Friendly and Reusable: These microfiber cleaning cloths are not only effective but also eco-friendly.
